## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and [TERMS_OF_USE.md](../TERMS_OF_USE.md) where relevant.
- [ ] Changes stay focused on this PR (no unrelated refactors).
- [ ] If I edited agents: frontmatter (`name`, `description`, `tools`, etc.) is still valid for Claude Code.
- [ ] If I changed `agents/`: I ran `python3 scripts/generate-skills.py` when skills output should stay in sync (if applicable).
- [ ] I did not remove required disclaimers or safety language for wellness-related or AI-output warnings.
